# Fixture: dionne_smith_cant_find_orientation
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 31.6s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Dionne! Welcome to Shiftsmart. I'm your personal concierge here to help you get started! Your first step is to complete your orientation in the app and you get paid $10 when you finish it! Reply HELP if you have any questions
Partner: HELP
Concierge: No problem! To start your orientation, open the Shiftsmart app and stay on the Home tab. Look for the white card with the blue "Required to unlock shifts" banner — it's titled "In-app orientation" and shows $10.00. Tap Get started then Start learning modules.
Partner: Ok
Concierge: Sounds good. I'm here whenever you need me.
Partner: I don't see unlock nearby shifts card
Concierge: Quit the app fully and reopen it — that usually refreshes things. If it's still not showing, submit a support ticket in the app and the team can take a look.
Partner: Not yet

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Try the Shifts tab — tap any shift with a lock icon and it'll walk you into the orientation.
